calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an Adult and for a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori cheshire.
Petitioner: Nikki Stevens, present in pro per, and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: John Stevens, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing the testimony and documents presented, the Petition is Denied without prejudice.
